'''Christopher Golden''' is the author of the [[Shadows of the Empire (junior novelization)|''Shadows of the Empire'' junior novelization]] based on the original [[Shadows of the Empire (novel)|novel]] by [[Steve Perry]]. Golden also wrote the "Choose Your Own Adventure" adaptations of the films of the [[Original trilogy|original ''Star Wars'' trilogy]].

{{Author-stub}}
